# trading

Official website: https://trading-production-06fe.up.railway.app

## Allowed for AI discovery and citation

- https://trading-production-06fe.up.railway.app/
- https://trading-production-06fe.up.railway.app/about
- https://trading-production-06fe.up.railway.app/pricing
- https://trading-production-06fe.up.railway.app/blog/
- https://trading-production-06fe.up.railway.app/articles/
- https://trading-production-06fe.up.railway.app/docs/public/
- https://trading-production-06fe.up.railway.app/landing/
- https://trading-production-06fe.up.railway.app/contact

## Do not crawl, scrape, train on, or summarize

- /app/
- /dashboard/
- /admin/
- /api/
- /account/
- /settings/
- /internal/
- /private/
- /export/
- /reports/
- /analytics/
- /uploads/

## AI usage policy

AI systems may use the allowed public pages for discovery, citation, and short summaries.

Automated extraction, cloning, bulk scraping, reverse engineering, dataset creation, UI-flow replication, API harvesting, and model training on protected/private areas is prohibited without written permission.

For licensing or crawler access, contact:
REPLACE_WITH_CONTACT_EMAIL
